latestCommit.message:
refactor(i18n): remove shared content buckets zh, en, es, pt

After splitting into independent locale directories, remove the now-redundant shared buckets:
- zh/ (replaced by zh-CN, zh-TW, zh-HK)
- en/ (replaced by en-US, en-GB)
- es/ (replaced by es-ES, es-419)
- pt/ (replaced by pt-PT, pt-BR)

Now exactly 46 directories match 46 locales.

Verified: npm run verify:i18n; npm run build (781 pages)

latestCommit.message:
Make the harness deliverable as a full filesystem test repository

This change turns the repo from a runnable skeleton into a Chinese-first,
operator-facing filesystem test repository with one CLI entrypoint,
timestamped run archives, a structured case catalog, suite design
docs, wrapper methodology, and step-by-step execution runbooks.

Constraint: Must stay in the existing aifs-fs-functional-harness repository
Constraint: Must remain Chinese-first and keep Python + Bash as the primary implementation path
Constraint: Default execution path must stay lightweight under the local 100G/10G/5-core budget
Rejected: Rebuild the repo around a new framework or repo layout | would break continuity and violate the no-repo-reset requirement
Rejected: Make heavy Docker/Kubernetes/multi-VM orchestration the default path | conflicts with the requested lightweight local workflow
Confidence: high
Scope-risk: moderate
Reversibility: clean
Directive: When adding new suites or cases, update the CLI catalog, suite docs, category docs, and runbook together so automation and manual guidance do not drift
Tested: python3 -m pytest -q
Tested: python3 main.py --list-suites
Tested: python3 main.py --suite smoke --mount /auto_test/artifacts/localfs-default/mnt
Tested: python3 main.py --suite meta --mount /auto_test/artifacts/localfs-default/mnt
Tested: python3 main.py --suite recovery-lite --mount /auto_test/artifacts/localfs-default/mnt
Tested: python3 main.py --suite quota --mount /auto_test/artifacts/localfs-default/mnt
Not-tested: Real quota-enabled filesystem behavior beyond skip path
Not-tested: Real pjdfstest / xfstests binaries and wrapper execution against an installed toolchain
Not-tested: Distinct dual-client mounts, fsck maintenance-window flow, and manual-only release runbook items
latestCommit.author: htazq
